## Type of change

- [ ] Erratum (citation/DOI/typo)
- [ ] Reproducibility fix (code change so `make all` succeeds)
- [ ] Data correction (inclusion/exclusion, effect size, RoB)

## Verification

- [ ] `make install`
- [ ] `make all` regenerates outputs without unintended diff
- [ ] `make validate` passes
- [ ] If touching data: `data/QUALITY_REPORT.md` regenerated
- [ ] CI is green
